description: Crawl websites and extract structured web content for AI and automation workflows.
name: io.qent.broxy/firecrawl

environmentVariables.description: API key for FireCrawl service authentication
environmentVariables.name: FIRECRAWL_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for API calls
environmentVariables.name: FIRECRAWL_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS

environmentVariables.description: Initial delay in milliseconds for retry backoff
environmentVariables.name: FIRECRAWL_RETRY_INITIAL_DELAY

environmentVariables.description: Maximum delay in milliseconds for retry backoff
environmentVariables.name: FIRECRAWL_RETRY_MAX_DELAY

environmentVariables.description: Backoff factor for retry delay calculation
environmentVariables.name: FIRECRAWL_RETRY_BACKOFF_FACTOR

title: Firecrawl
